root_cause: Requested image manifest or tag does not exist in the registry
evidence: ErrImagePull or ImagePullBackOff includes explicit manifest-not-found markers
Manifest lookup failures repeat or progress into backoff
Dominant manifest error: Back-off pulling image "ghcr.io/example/payments-api:2026.03.25-hotfix": rpc error: code = NotFound desc = manifest unknown

causes.message: Pod requests a specific image manifest or tag from the registry
Registry could not find the requested image manifest or tag
Kubelet cannot pull the image because the requested manifest is unavailable

pod:payments-api-84d55f7c95-4kmn8: Pod cannot start because the requested image manifest is missing from the registry

likely_causes: Image tag was mistyped or never pushed to the registry
Deployment still references an old image digest or tag that was deleted
Registry repository exists but the requested manifest was garbage-collected or never published
suggested_checks: Verify the image name, tag, or digest exists in the target registry
Compare the deployed image reference with the tags or manifests published by CI
Check whether the workload should pin a valid digest instead of a missing tag
